product_info.company_description: A tech company focused on developing advanced robotic solutions for everyday tasks and companionship.
product_info.product_description: An innovative android that not only assists with household chores but also provides companionship and emotional support, designed to enhance your daily life.
product_info.target_audience: Tech-savvy individuals, busy professionals, and families looking for assistance in home management and companionship.
selling_points: Dual functionality as a chore assistant and companion
User-friendly interface and easy integration into smart homes
product_info.call_to_action: Experience the future of home living - Get your ChoreBot today!
product_info.additional_info: Available for pre-order with customizable features.

campaign_theme.slogan: Elevate Your Home, Enhance Your Life.
campaign_theme.theme: A fusion of technology and companionship, showcasing the ChoreBot as an essential part of modern living. The visuals evoke a sense of tranquility and innovation in daily life.
campaign_theme.visual_style: The poster features the ChoreBot centered against a pure-white background, emphasizing its sleek design with extreme negative space. Video visuals will consist of close-ups on the ChoreBot engaging in various household tasks and offering companionship, all shot with soft, directional lighting to create a serene atmosphere.
campaign_theme.voiceover_script: Meet your new home companion, the ChoreBot. It's time to simplify your life with advanced technology. Experience the future of home living - Get your ChoreBot today!
